IncomeSource.title: Income Source
IncomeSource.description: Represents a stream of income for the user.

name.description: The name of the income source.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this income source.

RevenueEntry.title: Revenue Entry
RevenueEntry.description: An entry representing a specific amount of revenue earned from a source on a date.

date.description: The date the revenue was earned (ISO string YYYY-MM-DD).

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this entry.

Goal.title: User Goals
Goal.description: Daily and monthly revenue targets for the user.

userId.description: The ID of the user these goals belong to.

incomeSources.description: Collection of income sources defined by the user.

userGoals.description: Individual user goals for tracking performance.
